structured_data.question: Which ancient civilization built the Great Pyramid of Giza?
structured_data.explanation: The Great Pyramid of Giza is one of the Seven Wonders of the Ancient World and is attributed to the Ancient Egyptian civilization, specifically the pharaoh Khufu.

structured_data.question: Which ancient civilization built the city of Machu Picchu?
structured_data.explanation: Machu Picchu is an Incan citadel located on a mountain ridge above the Urubamba Valley in Peru.

structured_data.question: Which ancient civilization built the Great Library of Alexandria?
structured_data.explanation: The Great Library of Alexandria was built during the Ptolemaic Kingdom, which was a Greek dynasty that ruled Egypt after the death of Alexander the Great.

structured_data.question: What was the main outcome of the Treaty of Versailles in 1919?
options: Establishment of the League of Nations
structured_data.explanation: The Treaty of Versailles officially marked the end of World War I, bringing an end to the conflict between the Allied and Central Powers.

structured_data.question: Which ancient civilization built the city of Machu Picchu?
structured_data.explanation: Machu Picchu is an Incan citadel located in Peru, built in the 15th century.
